summary: Iteration 50: ALL NEW FEATURES VERIFIED - Web Scraping API, Community Feed, Period-based Subscriptions, PDF with logo/region-based labor
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/scrape/stores - Returns 5 Bulgarian stores (praktiker, jysk, mrbricolage, bauhaus, homemax)
✅ GET /api/scrape/search?q=plochki - Returns valid JSON with query, total, stores_searched fields
✅ GET /api/scrape/search - Correctly rejects short queries (<2 chars) with 400 status
✅ GET /api/community/posts - Returns paginated data (posts, total, page, pages)
✅ POST /api/community/posts - Creates post with auth (returns id, text, created_at)
✅ POST /api/community/posts/{id}/like - Toggle like works (liked: true/false, likes_count)
✅ POST /api/ai-designer/photo-pdf - Includes region-based labor cost (user_region param)
✅ Clicking 12 months shows discounted prices (12/28/60 EUR/мес)
✅ БАЗОВ button shows: 'Избери БАЗОВ — 144 EUR/12 мес.'
✅ ПРО button shows: 'Избери ПРО — 336 EUR/12 мес.'
✅ PREMIUM button shows: 'Избери PREMIUM — 720 EUR/12 мес.'
✅ Clicking 1 month shows original prices (15/35/75 EUR/мес)
✅ Filter buttons are clickable and work
✅ Posts display correctly with like/comment counts
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed community posts during testing (auto-cleanup via fixture)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 verified all new features: 1) Web Scraping API at /api/scrape/stores (5 stores) and /api/scrape/search (may return 0 products if stores block - acceptable). 2) Community Feed at /community - PUBLIC view, auth required for POST/like/comment/delete. Key data-testids: community-page, post-filters, filter-all/text/project/question/before_after, new-post-form, post-text-input, submit-post-btn. 3) Period-based subscriptions with 1/3/6/12 month options and 0/10/15/20% discounts. data-testids: firm-subscriptions-section, period-toggle, period-1/3/6/12. 4) PDF endpoint /api/ai-designer/photo-pdf includes user_region for region-based labor cost. Navigation to Community via Още -> Общност works.

web_scraping_stores.details: Returns 5 Bulgarian stores: praktiker, jysk, mrbricolage, bauhaus, homemax

web_scraping_search.details: Returns JSON with query, total, stores_searched, products fields. 0 results OK if stores block.

community_posts_public.details: Returns paginated posts array with total, page, pages

community_posts_create.details: Creates post with auth token - returns id, text, type, created_at

community_posts_like.details: Toggles like with auth - returns liked boolean and likes_count

community_posts_comment.details: Adds comment with auth - returns comment object with id, text, user info

community_posts_delete.details: Deletes own post with auth - returns {deleted: true}

community_page_ui.details: Page loads with filters: Всички, Обсъждане, Проекти, Въпроси, Преди/След

community_nav_link.details: Accessible via Още -> Общност in nav dropdown

period_toggle.details: Period toggle shows 1/3/6/12 months with -10%/-15%/-20% discount badges

period_12_months_discount.details: Selecting 12 months shows 20% discount - БАЗОВ 12 EUR/мес, ПРО 28 EUR/мес, PREMIUM 60 EUR/мес

pdf_with_region_labor.details: PDF generated with user_region and labor_estimate_eur from budget
